message:
refactor(benchmarks): remove redundant bench_compiled_logic_table

The benchmark was redundant - it used VectorOps_dot_product with len=1
per row (trivial multiplication), which doesn't showcase the Python
for loop → native Zig while loop optimization that @logic_table provides.

The remaining benchmarks (bench_logic_table, bench_pushdown) properly
demonstrate 384-dim vector operations and are well-aligned with the
@logic_table compilation pipeline.
